reasoning: Koren, the primary aim is addressing your lactate clearance limiter. Given the 25W drop from your 5-min to 20-min power, building fatigue resistance is key. We'll mimic parts of the Alpine Loop climb intensity during this session to enhance your performance on the actual course.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Over-unders 5x9min: 6min at 209-223W, 3min at 242-256W. 2 min recovery between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
